hero.title: Get Authentic Amazon Reviews That Last
hero.subtitle: Connect your book with verified readers who genuinely read, listen, and leave honest reviews. Progressive delivery keeps your rankings growing naturally.

stats.title: Numbers That Speak for Themselves
stats.subtitle: Thousands of authors trust BookProof to grow their Amazon presence with real, lasting reviews.

howItWorks.title: From Zero Reviews to Bestseller in 4 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Our streamlined system handles everything. You focus on writing — we handle the reviews.

purchase.title: Purchase Credits
purchase.description: Choose a credit package that fits your marketing goals. Credits are flexible and never expire — use them across any book in your catalog.

submit.title: Create Your Campaign
submit.description: Upload your book files, set your genre, and tell us about your target audience. Our system creates a fully configured campaign in minutes.

distribute.title: We Match & Distribute
distribute.description: BookProof matches your book with readers who love your genre. Access is granted progressively each week, creating a natural review pattern.

reviews.title: Collect Genuine Reviews
reviews.description: Readers submit their honest Amazon review plus internal feedback. You get a detailed campaign report and anonymous reader insights.

features.title: Everything Built for Your Book's Success
features.subtitle: BookProof combines authentic reader engagement with smart technology to deliver reviews that stick.

authentic.title: 100% Authentic Reviews
authentic.description: Real readers, real opinions. Every reviewer is a verified human who genuinely reads your book before writing. No bots, no outsourced reviews, no shortcuts.

distributed.title: Natural Distribution Pattern
distributed.description: Reviews are released in weekly batches that mirror organic reading patterns. Amazon's algorithm sees healthy, gradual review growth instead of suspicious spikes.

tracking.title: Real-Time Campaign Tracking
tracking.description: Your dashboard shows every review delivered, pending, and in progress. Weekly breakdowns, progress charts, and status updates keep you always informed.

flexible.title: Ebook & Audiobook Support
flexible.description: Whether you publish ebooks or audiobooks, we have you covered. Allocate credits to either format or split them across both within a single campaign.

guarantee.title: 14-Day Replacement Guarantee
guarantee.description: If Amazon removes a validated review within 14 days, we replace it at zero cost. Your investment is fully protected with automatic replacement tracking.

support.title: Dedicated Campaign Support
support.description: Our team actively monitors your campaign health. We handle reader issues, expired slots, and escalations so you never have to worry about the process.

report.title: Detailed Campaign Reports
report.description: When your campaign completes, receive a professional PDF report with rating distribution, anonymous reader feedback, and campaign timeline — ready to share or archive.

keywords.title: Keyword Research Add-On
keywords.description: Boost discoverability with our AI-powered keyword research service. Get optimized keywords for your title, subtitle, description, and Amazon KDP backend fields.

forAuthors.title: Everything an Author Needs to Launch Successfully
forAuthors.subtitle: BookProof gives you the tools, readers, and insights to take your book from invisible to influential on Amazon.

dashboard.title: Complete Campaign Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor every aspect of your campaign in one place. Track reviews delivered, credits remaining, reader progress, and weekly milestones from a clean, intuitive dashboard.

reports.title: Professional Campaign Reports
reports.description: Receive a detailed PDF report when your campaign ends. Includes star rating charts, anonymous reader feedback, and a full timeline of your review delivery.

genreMatch.title: Genre-Matched Readers
genreMatch.description: Your book is only shown to readers who actively read your genre. Romance authors get romance readers. Thriller writers get thriller fans. This improves review quality and authenticity.

formats.title: Ebook & Audiobook Ready
formats.description: Launch campaigns for ebooks in EPUB, PDF, or MOBI format, or audiobooks in MP3. You can even split credits between both formats within a single campaign.

feedback.title: Anonymous Internal Feedback
feedback.description: Before the campaign ends, you receive honest reader thoughts about your book — pacing, characters, plot, writing quality. Valuable editorial insight without identifying the reader.

keywordResearch.title: Keyword Research Service
keywordResearch.description: Add our AI-powered keyword research to any package. Get 5-10 primary keywords, 15 secondary terms, and 20 long-tail phrases with an implementation guide for Amazon KDP.

readerBenefits.title: Read Books You Love. Get Paid for Your Honest Opinion.
readerBenefits.subtitle: Join a community of passionate readers who discover new books, earn real money, and help authors get the visibility they deserve.

freeBooks.title: Free Books & Audiobooks
freeBooks.description: Get unlimited access to ebooks and audiobooks in your favorite genres at zero cost. Read new releases before the general public.

earnMoney.title: Earn Real Money
earnMoney.description: Get paid for every validated Amazon review. Ebook reviews earn a fixed rate per book; audiobook reviews earn more. Withdraw via PayPal, bank transfer, Wise, or crypto.

discoverBooks.title: Discover New Authors
discoverBooks.description: Be among the first to read upcoming releases from emerging and established authors. Expand your reading list while getting early access.

flexible.title: Read on Your Schedule
flexible.description: Each assignment gives you 72 hours to read and review. Apply only when you have time. No pressure, no quotas — completely flexible.

community.title: Join a Growing Community
community.description: Connect with thousands of fellow book lovers. Our reader community spans romance, thriller, science fiction, non-fiction, and every genre in between.

payout.title: Easy, Fast Payouts
payout.description: Request a payout anytime you reach the minimum threshold. Our admin team processes payments promptly. Multiple payment methods supported worldwide.

guarantee.title: The BookProof 14-Day Replacement Guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: We stand behind every review we deliver. If Amazon removes a validated review within 14 days, we replace it — completely free.

protected.title: Your Investment Is Protected
protected.description: Every credit you spend is backed by our guarantee. If a review disappears within 14 days of validation, it counts as a replacement slot — no additional credits needed.

monitored.title: Active Review Monitoring
monitored.description: Our team regularly checks all validated review links. When a removal is detected within the guarantee window, we immediately initiate a replacement without you having to ask.

automatic.title: Automatic Replacement Process
automatic.description: The replacement reader is pulled from your campaign queue automatically. You don't need to do anything — we handle the entire reassignment process behind the scenes.

transparent.title: Full Transparency in Reports
transparent.description: Your campaign report shows total reviews delivered, replacements made, and final retention rate. You always know exactly what happened with every review.

guarantee.note: Guarantee applies to reviews removed within 14 days of admin validation. Reviews removed after 14 days are not covered but represent a very small percentage of delivered reviews.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions, no monthly fees. Purchase credits and use them when you're ready. Every package includes our 14-day guarantee.
pricing.note: Prices set by admin. Contact us for current package pricing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about BookProof's review platform.

q1.question: How does BookProof work exactly?
q1.answer: BookProof connects authors with verified readers who love their genre. You purchase credits, create a campaign for your book, upload your files, and we handle distribution. Readers receive access in weekly batches, read your book within 72 hours, and post an honest Amazon review. You receive a campaign report when all reviews are delivered.

q2.question: Are these reviews against Amazon's Terms of Service?
q2.answer: Our readers genuinely read your books and provide honest feedback based on their real experience. We follow all Amazon policies and ensure reviews appear organic through natural weekly distribution patterns. Reviews are not incentivized in ways that violate Amazon's policies — readers are compensated for their time reading, not for leaving positive reviews.

q3.question: How long does it take to start getting reviews?
q3.answer: After your campaign is created and approved, the first batch of readers typically receives access within the first week. Reviews are then delivered progressively over 4-10 weeks depending on your package size. This natural pacing helps maintain authenticity and avoids any unusual patterns that could trigger review flags.

q4.question: What happens if Amazon removes a review?
q4.answer: We offer a 14-day replacement guarantee on all reviews. If a review is removed within 14 days of being validated, we replace it at no additional cost. Our team monitors all delivered reviews and initiates replacements automatically when a removal is detected within the guarantee window.

q5.question: Can I choose which readers get my book?
q5.answer: Readers are automatically matched based on their genre preferences and format compatibility with your book. This automatic matching actually improves review authenticity — readers genuinely choose genres they enjoy, resulting in more engaged, thoughtful reviews. You cannot select specific readers, but the genre-matching system ensures quality.

q6.question: What formats do you support?
q6.answer: We support ebooks in EPUB, PDF, and MOBI formats (up to 50MB) and audiobooks in MP3 format (up to 500MB). Credits are consumed differently: 1 credit per ebook review, 2 credits per audiobook review. You can split credits between both formats in a single campaign if your book is available in both.

q7.question: How are readers verified and vetted?
q7.answer: All readers go through a registration process that verifies their email, content format preferences, and Amazon profile links. Readers must maintain a good completion record — those who miss deadlines or submit poor-quality reviews are removed from the platform. We also check for duplicate accounts and ensure reader authenticity.

q8.question: Can I pause or cancel my campaign?
q8.answer: Yes, you can pause an active campaign at any time from your dashboard. Pausing stops new reader assignments while allowing readers who already received access to complete their reviews. Campaigns can be resumed at any time. Cancellation is available, but credits already allocated to readers in progress cannot be refunded.

q9.question: What do I receive when my campaign is complete?
q9.answer: When all reviews are delivered and validated, you receive a detailed campaign report as a PDF. The report includes: total reviews delivered, star rating distribution chart, anonymous reader feedback for each review, weekly delivery timeline, and replacement statistics. The report is also permanently available in your dashboard.

q10.question: How does keyword research work?
q10.answer: Our keyword research service uses AI to analyze your book's genre, description, target audience, and competing titles to generate optimized keywords. You receive a PDF report with 5-10 primary keywords, 10-15 secondary keywords, 15-20 long-tail phrases, and a complete implementation guide for Amazon KDP title, subtitle, description, and backend keyword fields.
